productDisplayName: Yelloe Blue Fun With Stripes Duffle Bag
description: A perfect option to go with your fashionable outfits when you're heading out for the weekend, this blue duffle bag from yelloe comes with a striped upper and a spacious inner to hold your daily essentials.Height: 31 cmWidth: 45 cmDepth: 18 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one zippered compartment with one inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentialsTwo short straps for carrying ease and styleA pocket on the front for additional spaceTwo side pocketsBranding embossed on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
